title: AI-Q Domain Rubric
description: A per-domain review rubric. Authored in YAML, validated against this schema.

appliesTo.description: Who this rubric is for (e.g. 'engineers reviewing AI-generated code').

focus.description: The domain-specific things a reviewer probes.

prompt.description: What to examine in the work.

probes.description: Seed interview questions for this domain (the engine adapts/selects from these).

specialFlag.description: The single most important thing to surface for this domain (e.g. the load-bearing assumption, or any line the author can't explain).
